summary: CRITICAL: SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1 and all fixture files (fixtures/feat-only-commits.txt, fixtures/fix-only-commits.txt, fixtures/breaking-commits.txt) are missing—referenced by workflow but not delivered. Workflow cannot execute without them. TDD methodology not demonstrated. Fragile JSON update via regex (lines 82–86 SemanticVersionBumper.psm1) lacks proper parsing; git command (line 21 bump-version.ps1) lacks error handling. Run-ActTests.ps1 references non-existent fixtures. Incomplete, non-executable deliverable.
